messages.content: Send an email to alice@example.com with subject 'Project Update' summarising that the backend migration is 80% complete and on track for Friday delivery.

arguments.subject: Project Update
arguments.body:
Dear Alice,

I hope this email finds you well.

I am writing to provide a quick update on the backend migration project. I am pleased to report that the migration is currently 80% complete and is progressing as planned. We are on track to meet our delivery target and expect to complete the work by this Friday.

Please let me know if you have any questions or need further details.

Best regards,
[Your Name]

content.delta: The email has been successfully sent to **alice@example.com** with the subject **"Project Update"**.
